---
title: "Does Media Coverage of Violence Affect Public Trust? Evidence from Violence against Doctors in China"
author: 
  - Jiayi Liu
date: "May 4, 2023"
---

This is my senior thesis. I identified the effect of violent anti-doctor incidents on individuals’ trust in doctors by a staggered
Difference-in-Differences strategy and analyzed heterogeneity by self-reported reliance on the Internet to
retrieve information. I also examined the dynamic effects by an event-study design.
